summary: REQ-1 appears implemented on the frontend by unifying the Dashboard “Due” computation with the Monthly Listing “Negative Credit” logic via shared utilities. REQ-2 is not convincingly implemented: the new shared carryover helper returns `soldeRestant`, which does not clearly equal the prior month’s ending credit/balance, so the “Previous month credit” carryover requirement is likely still unmet. REQ-3 is only enforced client-side in the UI; server-side uniqueness enforcement is not evidenced in the backend diff. REQ-4 (totals row in Client Database) is not evidenced in the shown ClientDatabasePage changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the Monthly Listing "Previous month credit" carryover so that for every month of the year, the "Previous month credit" column equals the ending credit/balance from the immediately preceding month (including year boundary).
missing_requirements.reason: The shared helper `getPreviousMonthCredit` returns `previousClient.soldeRestant` and even notes it is using `soldeRestant` from backend. This does not demonstrate that the value equals the prior month’s ending credit/balance as displayed, nor that it chains correctly month-to-month (March uses February ending credit, etc.). Also, no direct evidence is shown of Monthly Listing UI/backend using this corrected carryover for all months.

missing_requirements.requirement: Enforce uniqueness of the client reference field during both client creation and appointment creation with server-side validation and UI error display.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows only client-side duplicate checks in the appointment and client forms. The BuildRequest requires server-side enforcement (cannot be bypassed), but the backend diff excerpt does not show any uniqueness validation added to the actor methods.

missing_requirements.requirement: On the Client Database page, add a totals row directly under the table headers that shows the grand total (sum) of the "Paid this year" column across all displayed clients (respecting filtering/sorting).
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the provided ClientDatabasePage diff excerpt (or summaries) shows an added totals row under headers, nor computation of the displayed clients’ "Paid this year" sum.

hallucinated_features.description: Added backend migration scaffolding (new `backend/migration.mo` and `(with migration = Migration.run)` wiring).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not request a migration framework/scaffold; it focuses on calculation fixes, uniqueness validation, and a totals row.

hallucinated_features.description: Adjusted Rapport PDF calculations to reuse Monthly Listing utilities and added previous-month listing fetching logic for the report.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention changing the Rapport PDF page; changes appear unrelated to the specified requirements.
